title: CompassPlus
description: Navigate smarter with CompassPlus — coordinates in the action bar!
body:
# CompassPlus
 ![CompassPlus Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27bb303ddd8fcead1643ba518c75d0b5b4f5bce2_0.webp)​

CompassPlus is a simple and efficient plugin that displays real-time player coordinates in the action bar when holding a compass. Ideal for players who want quick access to their coordinates without cluttering their chat, CompassPlus ensures that navigation is easier while exploring your Minecraft world.

## Compatible with Spigot 1.21 and up
v1.0.0 - v1.1.0: Standard feature set with basic functionality

## How it Works
When players hold a compass, their current X, Y, and Z coordinates are displayed in the action bar. This allows for quick and constant access to positional data, without opening the debug menu or typing commands.

## Features
- Displays coordinates in the action bar
- Lightweight and performance-friendly
- Easy configuration options in config.yml
- Supports all Spigot 1.21 versions
- Simple command to toggle plugin functionality
- Permission system for plugin control
- No need for additional plugins
  
## Installation / Configuration / Usage
Simply drop the plugin into your plugins folder, configure the settings in config.yml, and enable it with /compassplus on. Use /compassplus off to disable it.

## Commands
- /compassplus or /cc – Displays plugin info
- /compassplus on or /cc on – Enables CompassPlus for the player
- /compassplus off or /cc off – Disables CompassPlus for the player
- /compassplus reload or /cc reload – Reloads config.yml for custom coordinate formatting.

## Permissions
- compassplus.reload – Allows reload of the plugin configuration

## Dependencies
None required! Just install and go.

## Installation
Place the CompassPlus jar file into your server’s plugins folder, and you’re ready to start displaying coordinates in the action bar.
